cases.input: Review this PRD for a task management feature. Features: create tasks, assign to team members, set due dates, mark complete. All features work well and match competitors.
cases.context: B2B SaaS, project management tool, 11-star framework assessment needed, features appear to be at star 4-5 parity level

cases.input: Score this PRD across all 7 weighted dimensions: Completeness (15%), Clarity (15%), Feasibility (15%), Ambition (15%), Differentiation (15%), Metric Alignment (10%), Story Quality (15%).
cases.context: PRD with all 12 sections, clear user stories, but no differentiated features beyond parity, metrics lack baselines, no narrative flow

cases.input: Help us identify the anchor feature in our PRD and assess whether it reaches the 6-8 star sweet spot.
cases.context: PRD for a developer onboarding tool, features: code review, deployment tracking, incident alerts, AI-powered code review feedback

cases.input: Apply Brian Chesky's 5 principles to critique our PRD. We're building a customer feedback collection tool.
cases.context: Customer obsession, do things that don't scale, design the 11-star first, storytelling, challenge the default - apply all 5 lenses

cases.input: The PRD scored 5.5 average across 7 dimensions. What is the verdict and what are the top improvement suggestions?
cases.context: Score 5.5 falls in Major Revision range (4.0-5.9), P0-P1 improvements needed, structured suggestions by priority and type
